message.content:
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory

participant "AudioFileHeader" as AFH
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory" as AFHA
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter" as AFHAP

AFH -> AFHA : **1** audio id
AFHA -> AFHAP : **2** audio id
AFHAP -> AFHAP : **3** edit sample and delete sample\ndialogs as render functions

opt [if route is "Quick Save"]
  AFHAP -> AFHAP : **4** assign sample dialog as render functions
end

AFHAP -> AFHA : **5** list of render functions
AFHA -> AFHA : render drop-down menu\n**6** and dialog render functions\nin render()

@enduml
